meaning: n.(爱尔兰民间传说中的) 妖精
examples: You could search forever in Ireland, but you'd never find a leprechaun.
You just caught yourself a leprechaun.
Now he has tattoo of Lucky, the Boston Celtics leprechaun, spinning the trophy on his finger, prognosticating a championship with the team he has yet to play a game for.
Regis Philbin, Dick Vitale and Martin Short are a few of the invited guest speakers, and of course the Notre Dame cheerleaders and the Leprechaun will be in attendance to amp up the crowd. 12-4 p.m.
